tweets.title:
Nepal Objects to Kailash Mansarovar Route via Lipulekh

Nepal has objected to India–China plans to conduct the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra via Lipulekh Pass, falsely claiming the route passes through its territory.

Kathmandu reiterated that Lipulekh, Kalapani, and Limpiyadhura belong to Nepal, citing historical treaties, and said it was not consulted on the decision.

Indian Ministry of External Affairs rejected the claim, stating the route has been in use since 1954 and termed Nepal’s position “untenable”, while remaining open to dialogue.

tweets.title:
Bangladesh Is Upgrading Air Defence Near India's Siliguri Corridor 

Reports indicate the Bangladesh Army is installing an air defence and radar system at Lalmonirhat airbase, located less than 20 km from the India border (Cooch Behar sector).

Details:
- Installation work ongoing alongside a newly built large hangar
- Airbase spans ~1,166 acres with a 4 km runway
- Parallel upgrades underway at Bogura airbase
- System expected to enhance surveillance & tracking.

Indian authorities are monitoring developments, especially given the base’s proximity to the strategically sensitive Siliguri Corridor (“Chicken’s Neck”).
